name: Ettin
special_abilities: [{"name":"Two Heads","desc":"The ettin has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks and on saving throws against being blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, stunned, and knocked unconscious."},{"name":"Wakeful","desc":"When one of the ettin's heads is asleep, its other head is awake."}]
